name: Creamy New York Low-Fat Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fat-free cookie crumbs (Health Valley Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
CREAMY NEW YORK CHEEESCAKE
Day before, drain yogurt to make yogurt cheese. Let it sit for at least 24 hours.
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Moisten fingers with water and press cookie crumbs over the bottom and slightly up the sides of a 9- or 10-inch spring form pan. Chill while preparing remaining ingredients.
3. With a beater or hand mixer, beat yogurt cheese, honey, vanilla extract, arrowroot, and egg whites until thoroughly blended.
4. Pour filling into the crumb-lined pan.
5. Bake at 300°F for 60-75 minutes until set and lightly browned on top. Turn off heat and let it cool to room temperature before refrigerating several hours until thoroughly chilled.
yield: 12 servings
Nutrition information
Calories: 214
Fat: 0.3 grams (read this as "point 3 grams")
Percentage of calories from fat: 1%
Cholesterol: 2.7 milligrams
Sodium: 156 milligrams
Dietary Fiber: 1.3 grams
